hooks.prompt:

2. Run 'cd /Users/marius/Tc\ Much\ App/tennis-club && npm run build -w shared' - check shared package builds
3. Check that no TODO or FIXME comments were left in recently changed files (use git diff --name-only HEAD~1 to find them, then grep)
4. Verify the changes match the specification in the root file '# Tennis Club App – System Specification.md'

If ANY check fails, respond with the reason explaining what needs fixing.
